name: kiln
description: Multi-model software creation pipeline — native Claude Code, one kernel, five stage cards: GPT-5.6 codes, Claude designs and reviews.

plugins.name: kiln
plugins.description: One command turns a conversation into working, tested software. An interactive brainstorm first, then a single content-blind kernel walks the stages — law, build, validate, report. GPT-5.6 writes the code; Claude designs the interfaces and creative work; every piece is inspected by the other family, and a missing Codex means an honest Claude-only run, plainly labeled.
